Double Coating Pleasure

Double
Vanilla
Caramel

Vanilla ice cream dipped in a chocolatey coating and a luxurious layer of caramel sauce, wrapped in exquisite cracked Magnum Belgian milk chocolate.

Tap to bite / crack
Select Your Pleasure
Made With Pure Belgian Chocolate
Melt Simulation V.1

Every drop is sourced from sustainably farmed rainforest cocoa beans, roasted to golden perfection.

Anatomy of Indulgence

The Velvet Blueprint

Decades of ice cream mastery designed into a flawless sequence of premium temperatures, textures, and sounds.

Layer 01 — Outer Shell

The Belgian Chocolate Snap

Every Magnum bar is signature-dipped in high-grade premium Belgian milk chocolate. Engineered with a calibrated thickness of exactly 1.2mm, it delivers the iconic "crack" sound on your first bite—releasing a burst of authentic cacao complexity.

Sound Frequency 4.5 kHz Crack
Sustainably Sourced 100% Cocoa
Uncompromising Integrity

Mastery in Every Particle

We travel the equator, working hand-in-hand with Rainforest Alliance Certified farms to harvest cocoa that respects both earth and artisan.

Trace Our Ingredients
100% Sustainably Sourced

Certified by the Rainforest Alliance, helping protect biodiversity and support farm livelihoods.

1.2mm Optimized Thickness

Calculated down to the micrometer for the perfect snap-to-melt ratio in any climate.

#1 Global Standard

Recognized worldwide as the gold standard for premium chocolate-dipped ice cream.

4 Layers Flavor Architecture

Cracked coating, sauce, premium mid-shell, and slow-churned core.

Taste The Portfolio

The Pleasure Chamber

Every flavor represents an architectural exploration of balance, intensity, and texture.

Gold Standard

Double Caramel

Smooth Madagascan vanilla, velvet thick caramel layer, and signature chocolate crunch.

Rich Fruity Tartness

Double Raspberry

Decadent dark chocolate paired with sharp, refreshing raspberry coulis and vanilla cream.

The Ultimate Sweet

Gold Billionaire

Salty-sweet gold caramel chocolate layered with crisp biscuit bits and roasted pecan hints.

Ready for the Crack?

Sign up to access exclusive private flavor launches, luxury dining pop-ups, and early boutique chocolate pairings.

Ritual accepted. Welcome to the Inner Circle.
